summary: Client Portal & Share as PDF feature testing - All features working. Fixed login bug with quick access buttons.
seed_data_creation: Mohan client user (user_mohan_client) linked to project proj_ca1781bb430a (Mohan Home) - pre-existing in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Portal fully functional. Login flow fixed for quick access buttons. Share as PDF uses browser print (window.print()).

client_login_redirect.details: mohan@client.com login redirects to /client-portal (fixed stale state bug in quick access buttons)

my_projects_list.details: Client portal shows 'My Projects' with Mohan Home project card (project_id: proj_ca1781bb430a)

project_detail_view.details: Full project details shown with tabs: Overview, Payment Schedule, Scope of Work, Photos, Documents

share_as_pdf_client.details: Share as PDF button (data-testid: print-pdf-btn) visible and triggers window.print()

share_as_pdf_admin.details: Share as PDF button (data-testid: share-pdf-btn) visible on ProjectDetail.jsx admin view

payment_stages_visible.details: Client sees payment schedule with stages, amounts, received, balance, status

scope_items_visible.details: Client sees scope items with item description, qty, unit, rate, amount

work_orders_excluded.details: Work Orders tab NOT visible in client portal (correctly excluded)

expenses_excluded.details: Expenses tab NOT visible in client portal (correctly excluded)

internal_notes_excluded.details: Internal notes field excluded from API responses via MongoDB projection

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/demo-login: PASS - Returns user data with correct role
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/client-portal/my-projects: PASS - Returns projects linked to client user_id
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/client-portal/project/{project_: PASS - Returns project details with payment_stages, scope_items (excludes internal_notes)

bug_fixed.issue: Quick access buttons on login page were using stale selectedEmail state
bug_fixed.cause: setTimeout with closure captured old state before setSelectedEmail updated
bug_fixed.fix: Modified handleDemoLogin to accept emailOverride parameter, pass email directly from quick button onclick

data_testid_elements.quick-client-(mohan): Quick access button for Mohan client login
data_testid_elements.project-card-proj_ca1781bb430a: Mohan Home project card in My Projects list
data_testid_elements.print-pdf-btn: Share as PDF button in Client Portal detail view
data_testid_elements.share-pdf-btn: Share as PDF button in Admin Project Detail view

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real - no mocked endpoints
